title: IDN Goes to Society
text: 10 grade Program to interact with the people around the school, we were given one week to get to acquaintance 80 people and take photos with them as proof if were really doing this program. Each team  there are three people. Alhamdulillah, we acquaintance 60 people with the documentation. We were also must to stay at mosque and participate in mosque activities, such as teaching children to reading Quran and giving short advice to prayers.

title: IDN Teaching - Kediri, SMP Pawyatan Daha 2
text: On the 21st–25th of 2025 when i'm 10 grade, we doing an IDN teaching program. The goal of this program was to build students' confidence in speaking in front of an audience or students. Me with three my friends, we chose the themes of HTML, CSS, JavaScript/Website Fundamentals, and AI. The program for one week, and we stayed at a mosque near the school.

title: LDKS - basic student leadership training - the beginning of IDN Batch 4
text:
When we first arrived in IDN school, we were divided into several groups and the next day we quickly left going to the park place, i think the place is like a small hill in Indoensia, we spent three days doing activities organized by the IDN student council and also the teacher.

pardon me for the little documentation of the activities, our teacher did not share it with the student.
